title: Tesla Supervised FSD Launches in China
summary: Tesla announced on X that its supervised Full Self-Driving (FSD) system is now available in China. This marks a significant expansion of Tesla's autonomous driving technology into the world's largest automotive market, potentially accelerating FSD adoption globally. The announcement lacks technical specifics such as regulatory approvals or feature differences from the US version. FSD (Supervised) still requires constant driver attention.
context: Tesla's Full Self-Driving (Supervised) is an advanced driver-assistance system that handles many driving tasks but requires an attentive driver ready to intervene. It includes navigation on most roads, self-parking, and summon features. The system has been available in North America and is now expanding to China.
